hero.headline: Bring your ideas
hero.subtext: 3D Printing personalised Household things, Prototypes and more. Printed with Precision, delivered with care.

products.label: What we make
products.title: Four categories, endless possibilities
products.subtitle: Every item is printed to order ГўВЂВ” custom sizes, colours and text always available.

items.title: Home & Organisation
items.description: Practical prints that make your space work smarter ГўВЂВ” designed for real life, printed to fit.

items.title: Prototypes & Parts
items.description: Need a custom bracket, replacement part or a prototype for your idea? We print it precisely.

items.title: Custom Name & Text
items.description: Personalised with any name, word or short message ГўВЂВ” perfect for gifts that actually mean something.

items.title: Gifts & DГѓВ©cor
items.description: Decorative prints and thoughtful gifts that stand out ГўВЂВ” unique, durable and made to order.

household.name: Desk Cable Organiser
household.description: Keep your desk tidy with this sleek cable management clip set. Mounts to the edge of any desk and holds up to 4 cables neatly in place. Available in all standard colours.

household.name: Wall Hook Set (3 pcs)
household.description: Minimalist wall hooks for coats, bags, keys or towels. Each hook holds up to 2 kg. Comes as a set of 3. Just drill, mount and done.

household.name: Bedside Phone Stand
household.description: A slim angled stand that holds your phone at the perfect viewing angle on a nightstand or desk. Stable, lightweight and printed in one piece.

household.name: Spice Jar Label Clips
household.description: Clip-on label holders for standard spice jars (fits most 40ГўВЂВ“50mm diameter jars). Print any label you like and slot it in. Set of 6.

household.name: Drawer Divider Set
household.description: Custom-fit drawer dividers for kitchen or desk drawers. Tell us your drawer dimensions and we will print dividers that slot in perfectly. Set of 4.

household.name: Toothbrush & Soap Holder
household.description: Bathroom organiser with slots for 2 toothbrushes and a small soap dish. Compact, easy to clean and printed in moisture-resistant PLA.

gifts.name: Custom Name Keychain
gifts.description: Personalised keychain with any name, word or short phrase. Printed in your chosen colour. A simple, meaningful gift that actually gets used every day.

gifts.name: Desk Name Plate
gifts.description: A stylish desk nameplate with your name or title in clean raised lettering. Perfect for a home office or as a gift for a new job or promotion.

gifts.name: Mini Planter (personalised)
gifts.description: A small geometric planter with your name or initials embossed on the side. Fits a standard succulent or small cactus pot. Drainage hole included.

gifts.name: Baby Name Wall Letters
gifts.description: Spell out any name in chunky 3D letters for a nursery or kids room wall. Each letter is approximately 80mm tall. Priced per 3 letters.

gifts.name: Wedding Favour Tags (10 pcs)
gifts.description: Customised wedding favour tags with the couple's names and date. Light, elegant and far more durable than paper. Set of 10.

gifts.name: Pet Name Tag
gifts.description: A durable, lightweight tag for your pet's collar with their name and your phone number. Bone shape or round ГўВЂВ” your choice.

prototypes.name: Custom Bracket / Mount
prototypes.description: Have something that needs a custom mounting bracket or support? Send us the dimensions and we will design and print a precise fit. Price varies by complexity ГўВЂВ” this is a base rate.

prototypes.name: Enclosure / Housing
prototypes.description: Custom enclosure for electronics, sensors or small devices. Send us your PCB dimensions or a sketch and we will design a clean, functional housing.

prototypes.name: Replacement Part
prototypes.description: Broken plastic clip, knob, handle or fitting? If you can describe it or send a photo, we can very likely print a functional replacement. Fast turnaround.

prototypes.name: Jig or Fixture
prototypes.description: Workshop jig, drilling template, alignment tool or assembly fixture. Tell us what you are trying to align or repeat and we will design it for you.

prototypes.name: Concept Prototype
prototypes.description: Have a product idea you want to hold in your hand? We will print a concept prototype from your sketch or description. Great for pitches, testing and feedback.

prototypes.name: Mechanical Test Part
prototypes.description: Functional mechanical component for fit and function testing ГўВЂВ” gears, clips, hinges, connectors. Printed in tough PLA or PETG. Quote based on your specs.

decor.name: Geometric Vase (small)
decor.description: A faceted geometric vase in a modern low-poly style. Holds dried flowers, pampas grass or thin real stems with a small glass insert. Approx 15 cm tall.

decor.name: Wall Art Panel
decor.description: A decorative 3D wall panel in a geometric or organic pattern. Available in multiple sizes. Looks great as a single panel or in a set of 3.

decor.name: Floating Shelf Bracket
decor.description: A stylish geometric shelf bracket that doubles as wall decor. Strong enough for light shelving (books, plants, decor). Sold as a pair.

decor.name: Candle Holder Set (3 pcs)
decor.description: A set of 3 minimalist taper or tea-light candle holders in varying heights. Clean lines, stable base, printed in any colour.

decor.name: Plant Pot Stand
decor.description: Elevated stand for a standard 10ГўВЂВ“12 cm plant pot. Adds height and style to any windowsill or shelf. Available in all colours.

decor.name: Lamp Shade (geometric)
decor.description: A geometric low-poly lamp shade designed for a standard E27 bulb fitting. Creates beautiful patterned light effects. Approx 20 cm diameter.

how.label: The process
how.title: Order in 3 simple steps
how.subtitle: No complicated forms. Just send an email and we'll handle the rest.

steps.title: Tell us what you need
steps.description: Send us an email with what you'd like ГўВЂВ” name, size, colour, quantity. Not sure? Just describe your idea.

steps.title: Get a quote & confirm
steps.description: We'll reply within 24 hours with a price, estimated time, and a preview if needed. You confirm before anything is printed.

steps.title: Receive your print
steps.description: We print it and arrange delivery. Payment by bank transfer or PayPal once you're happy with the result.

order.label: Ready to order?
order.title: Let's make something
order.subtitle: Send us an email with your idea ГўВЂВ” no need to have all the details figured out. We'll help you get there.
order.sub_text: We reply within 24 hours Г‚В· No upfront payment Г‚В· Free quote

items.q: What materials do you print with?
items.a: Primarily PLA ГўВЂВ” durable and eco-friendly. Available in all our standard colours. We can discuss alternatives for specific functional needs.

items.q: How long does an order take?
items.a: Standard orders take 5ГўВЂВ“7 working days from confirmation. Complex or large items may take longer ГўВЂВ” we always confirm the timeline upfront.

items.q: Can I request a completely custom design?
items.a: Absolutely. Send us your idea, sketch or reference image at orders@forgelayer.online. We'll quote you within 24 hours ГўВЂВ” no obligation.
Black, White, Red, Pink, Orange, Sky Blue and Grey. Need something else? Just ask.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Browse our categories, then email orders@forgelayer.online. We reply within 24 hours.

items.q: Can I see a preview before printing?
items.a: Yes ГўВЂВ” for custom orders we send a digital render for your approval before anything is printed.

items.q: What is the maximum print size?
items.a: Up to 256 ГѓВ— 256 ГѓВ— 256 mm. Larger items can be printed in sections and joined seamlessly.
Yes, we ship throughout Germany. Shipping cost is confirmed at the time of order. Local pickup is also available.
Since all prints are custom-made, we do not accept returns unless there is a manufacturing defect. We send photos before shipping so you can approve.

items.q: How do I send you my design files?
items.a: Send STL, OBJ or 3MF files to orders@forgelayer.online. We can also design from scratch based on your description or sketch.
